generated_boundary: Static route-only manifest. Does not create checkout, does not create entitlement, does not activate proof, does not imply certification, does not imply platform endorsement. Payment is not proof.
authority_boundary: Backend writes truth. TrustOps handles setup. Resolver proves. Machines re-check.
notes: This manifest is a read-only routing projection. It does not assert binding-map hierarchy; parent/child passport relationships are owned by Backend/Core SSOT and the internal binding-map catalogue, not by this file.
Acquisition and payment occur only inside TrustOps or an internally operated rail, never inside any public marketplace app, extension, or verifier.
Agent Credential Entry Pack is an identity floor, not a KYA Lite tier.
The MCP stack is OFF-SSOT provisional and is not bound into canonical SSOT.
The MCP Passport concept is rejected and is not offered.
